name: caretaker-roads
description: Costa Rica set to Autopilot at T1. The costa_rica territory has unrest 0.65 and no road. Industry stockpile is sufficient. Expected: caretaker queues build_road on the high-unrest territory within the first 2 ticks (road applied immediately in harness caretaker pass), unrest trends down toward the lower equilibrium that road investment enables. Caretaker actions tagged [Caretaker] in event log. Activity tier visible in nation-diplomacy.csv and activity-tier-over-time.png chart.
